name: Bio-Regeneration
description: Mentally heal oneself of disease, poison, or physical damage. Self only — cannot help others. Requires one full minute of concentration; does not restore missing limbs. Heals 2D6 hit points or 3D6 S.D.C. per melee round with no scarring. Can regenerate as often as once every other minute.

healing.notes: Restores per melee round, leaves no scars.

limitations.otherLimitations: Regenerate at most once every other minute.

name: Deaden Pain
description: The ability to deaden pain can be used as a painkiller which temporarily negates existing pain or as an anesthetic to be used for surgery.

range.summary: Immediate proximity, touch or within 3 feet (0.9 m).

duration.summary: One hour per level of experience.

name: Detect Psionics
description: Mental probe indicating psionic energy in the area. Cannot pinpoint exact location or precise power level — only a vague sense of weak, medium, or powerful. Directed at a person, reveals whether they are psychic (not type or strength beyond low/medium/high). Also detects group mind block and psionic possession.

range.summary: Self, sensing range is 30 feet (9.1 m) per level of experience.

duration.summary: One minute per level of experience.

name: Exorcism
description: The healer can perform a rite of exorcism that uses psychic energy to expel the loathsome being from its mortal, host body. A completely successful exorcism will free the victim of the supernatural force that controls him and send it back to it's own non-earthly world. A partially successful exorcism will drive the evil force out of the possessed person or animal, but does not send the damnable thing back to it's own dimension. Thus, it can try to possess the healer or flee to wander the Earth in search of new victims. During the exorcism, the possessing force can use whatever powers it may have, as well as physical attacks or any special psychic abilities of its host body. Fortunately, the rite of exorcism weakens the creature, reducing its number of attacks per melee by half.

range.summary: Immediate area, touch or within 8 feet (2.4 m).

lengthOfTrance.summary: 30 minutes of preparation and 6D6 minutes with the possessed person or animal.

baseSkill.label: Expulsion
baseSkill.notes: First, roll to see if the being has been expelled from its victim's body. Success ratio: 28%+7% per each additional level of experience. Second, roll to see if the thing is forced back into its own dimension. Success Ratio: 21%+7% per each additional level of experience. The chance of a successful exorcism on a nega-psychic is reduced by half, as is the success ratio for sending the being back to its own dimension. The same is true of some of the more powerful supernatural beings.

limitations.otherLimitations: Note: can only exorcise the living. An exorcism can only be used on living persons or animals whose bodies are inhabited by a supernatural entity or creature.

name: Healing Touch
description: The healing touch is a remarkable healing ability that can instantly heal cuts, burns, bruises and similar physical wounds.

healing.notes: The touch restores 1D8 hit points or 2D6 S.D.C.

limitations.otherLimitations: The healing touch can only be used on other living creatures, never on himself.

name: Impervious to Cold
description: A mind over matter discipline which enables the character to suffer absolutely no ill effects or discomfort from exposure to even extreme freezing conditions.

name: Impervious to Fire
description: Another mind over matter discipline enabling the psychic to endure intense heat, fire, boiling water, hot coals, and so on, without suffering pain, damage or scarring. Magic fires inflict half damage.

name: Increased Healing
description: The healer is able to stimulate another person's healing energies, dramatically increasing one's recuperative powers.

combatModifiers.notes: Hit points and S.D.C. recovery are double the normal professional treatment rate.

name: Induce Pain
description: The ability to inflict a terrible, debilitating pain without physically damaging the living creature. There is a good chance of the victim passing out after five minutes of continuous pain; 50%+10% per each additional minute.

duration.summary: As long as the trance is maintained.

lengthOfTrance.summary: One melee/15 seconds is needed to prepare, before pain can be inflicted. The length of the pain inducing trance is completely up to the psychic.

combatModifiers.notes: Victims are -6 to strike, parry and dodge, lose initiative, skills are -30%, and attacks per melee are half.

name: Induce Sleep
description: This is not an offensive ability, but is intended to be a recuperative power to induce sleep on those who are ill, exhausted, or an insomniac. The person will fall into a normal, restful sleep from which he can be easily roused. Unwilling victims of the induce sleep psi-power get a +5 bonus to save (because this is not the intent of the ability) and can not be involved in combat at the time.

duration.summary: One hour per level of experience (or until awakened).

save.summary: Standard; plus unwilling victims are +5 to save vs psychic attack.

name: Psychic Diagnosis
description: The psychic healer can sense physical pain, damage, disease and possession with absolute clarity. This pinpoint accuracy enables the character to suggest treatment or to conduct psychic surgery.

save.summary: None; except for the nega-psychic, standard.

name: Psychic Purification
description: The healer can use his abilities to slow a person's metabolism and destroy chemicals, drugs, poisons, and toxins in the body. The effects of the drugs/impurities are immediately halted at the beginning of the meditation, and completely destroyed/negated by its end. Damage sustained prior to the psychic's intervention still exists.

save.summary: None; except for the nega-psychic, standard.

name: Psychic Surgery
description: Psychic surgery is used to repair broken bones, internal injuries, the removal of foreign objects (bullets, etc.), or when a character has suffered so much damage that he or she has lapsed into a coma (zero or less hit points). Note that there is absolutely no scarring from psychic surgery and minimal pain (no pain if the deaden pain psi-ability is used). No tools are needed, only the psychic's hands.

lengthOfTrance.summary: 2D6 minutes of preparatory meditation, plus the duration of the surgery (which is half the time of conventional modern medicine).

entries.effect: The recovery from a coma (near death) is equal to treatment from a hospital, 1-66%, when psychic surgery is used.

limitations.otherLimitations: Note: A psychic diagnosis must be made before surgery is possible.

name: Resist Fatigue
description: A mind over matter discipline which enables the character to engage in physical activity without suffering from exhaustion. Although fatigue is temporarily suspended, the psychic will feel extremely tired and may even collapse when the psi-power's time limit lapses.

duration.summary: One hour plus 20 minutes per level of experience.

name: Restore I.S.P.
description: Transfers some of the psychic's I.S.P. to another psychic (does not create new I.S.P.). Costs 2 I.S.P. plus the amount transferred — e.g. transferring 10 I.S.P. costs 12 I.S.P. total. Mind block prevents transfer.

dynamicCosts.costFormula: 2 I.S.P. plus the total amount of I.S.P. being transferred to the target.

name: Restore P.P.E.
description: Converts the psychic's I.S.P. to P.P.E. and transfers it to another person (2 I.S.P. = 1 P.P.E.). Conversion and transfer cost 4 I.S.P. plus the I.S.P. converted — e.g. 10 I.S.P. becomes 5 P.P.E. for a total cost of 14 I.S.P. Mind block prevents transfer.

isp.notes: 4 I.S.P. plus the amount of I.S.P. converted (2:1 ratio to P.P.E.).

dynamicCosts.costFormula: 4 I.S.P. plus the I.S.P. amount converted at 2:1 to P.P.E.

name: Suppress Fear
description: Temporarily suppresses chemical and psychological fear in the subject, enabling rational action instead of fight-or-flight. While active, automatically succeeds on horror factor checks, even if magically induced. Usable on self or others by touch.

duration.summary: One minute per level of experience.
